notes: This manifest intentionally has no year filter; it replays all cached official matches, currently the 2024-2026 cache.
It checks whether the 2026 residual-ridge improvement survives multiple game years before we describe it as more than a current-season candidate.
The residual model trains only on prior prediction errors during replay; the current match is never used to train its own correction.
